items.title: Nine out of 10 bets this fund manager made over the past year have outperformed. These are his next two plays.
items.description: Gold miners, Japan stocks and nuclear plays boosted Man Group’s portfolio

items.title: His lawyer said, ‘He’s gone off the deep end.’ My brother is paranoid and forgot he sold his house. What can I do?
items.description: “My sister and I are his only family, the will is made and we would inherit his estate.”

items.title: Wholesale prices rise sharply and point to persistent inflation

items.title: Is it OK to wear pajamas on your next flight? A viral post sparks debate.
items.description: Tampa International Airport issued a mock ban on sleepwear. Plenty of comments soon followed.

items.title: FanDuel parent’s stock tumbles as the house just can’t seem to win for its investors
items.description: Shares of FanDuel’s parent were pointing down after disappointing earnings. Its users lost too many bets and left for competitors.
